query:
SELECT 
  id, stockNumber, brand, model, year,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM facebookAds WHERE facebookAds.inventoryItemId = inventoryItems.id) as adCount
FROM inventoryItems 
WHERE dealerId = 60001 
LIMIT 5;
command:
